paper_focus.title: Microstructure and mechanical properties of Fe–30Mn–9Al–C–3Ni low-density steel manufactured by selective laser melting
paper_focus.research_objective: To investigate the influence of laser power on the microstructure and mechanical properties of Fe–30Mn–9Al–C–3Ni low-density steel fabricated by selective laser melting for the first time, and to achieve optimized comprehensive mechanical performance.
main_process_variables: laser scanning strategy: 67° rotation per layer
